content:
Fix resolver to handle all real-world npm version spec patterns encountered in tech-platform Nx monorepo (~1500 packages).

### Current State

- Bare package name alias (storybook-jest): fixed in 65c5f159
- Hyphen range (2 - 4): not yet supported
- tech-platform install fails at hyphen range parsing

### Target State

- All npm semver patterns supported: hyphen ranges, bare aliases (including scoped), OR ranges, pre-release
- tech-platform Nx monorepo installs successfully
- Trimmed test fixture committed for CI
